title: Question about the Eva Custom shirts
display_title: Question about the Eva Custom shirts
wikitext:
[]: Question about the Eva Custom shirts             Quote Post by atranquilnation » Thu Jan 19, 2012 5:30 am I about crapped my pants when i saw these! I want to purchase all of them, but theres one problem.. i can't read Japanese! I translated the page through google, but in doing so it left me unable to customize the shirts. I couldnt even click the add to shopping cart button! Has anyone purchased one of these and if so, how did you do it? First post btw Glad to see I'm not the only person obsessed with Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Jan 19, 2012 8:57 am What are Eva Custom Shirts? I'm sorry, but google couldn't help me out here...

[]: Re: Question about the Eva Custom shirts             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Jan 19, 2012 9:18 am atranquilnation wrote: Has anyone purchased one of these and if so, how did you do it?

[]: Re: Question about the Eva Custom shirts             Quote Post by atranquilnation » Thu Jan 19, 2012 3:27 pm symbv wrote: Not sure what you mean by Eva Custom shirts, do you mean this? http://forum.evageeks.org/post/470088/Pictures-thread/#470088

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Jan 19, 2012 9:44 pm OK, basically you can pick your combination of (T-shirt|smartphone) x Size x Color x Design. The number of colors and designs is quite impressive. Anyway, delivery is only domestic, so you need to have a Japan address first...

[]:             Quote Post by atranquilnation » Fri Jan 20, 2012 1:00 am symbv wrote: OK, basically you can pick your combination of (T-shirt|smartphone) x Size x Color x Design. The number of colors and designs is quite impressive. Anyway, delivery is only domestic, so you need to have a Japan address first...

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:50 am I'd love to get my hands on even one of these!

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:54 am ^ My guess: mainly logistics and language concern.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Jan 20, 2012 9:04 am Well, if anyone has an idea how to get my hands on one of those sexy iPhone covers, please tell me :)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Mar 12, 2012 7:26 pm Sexy Zombie Kaworu and 01 with positron rifle have been added to the catalogue. Anyway, it's not been mentioned before but I suppose that it should be possible to order this stuff with one of those proxy services but unfortunately I've no experience with them.
